title: A test-retest resting and cognitive state EEG dataset
description: A test-retest EEG dataset comprising resting-state (eyes open and closed) and cognitive-state recordings from 60 participants across three experimental sessions. The dataset includes electroencephalographic measurements alongside assessments of sleep quality, emotional state, mental health, and mind-wandering characteristics, designed to support investigations of neural correlates across different cognitive and resting conditions.
methods_description: EEG data were acquired using a 64-electrode Brain Products system at 500 Hz sampling frequency with impedances maintained below 5 kΩ. Recordings included resting-state conditions (eyes open and closed) and cognitive tasks (subtraction, music listening, and memory tasks) collected from September 2019 to April 2021.

funding_references.funder_name: National Natural Science Foundation of China
Major Project of Medicine Science and Technology of PLA
